CONTENT.Career: In November 2012 Nilsson was handed his first professional contract by GIF Sundsvall.In February 2016 he signed a five-year contract with IF Elfsborg for a fee around €500,000 (5 million SEK).In July 2019, Nilsson joined 2. Bundesliga side Arminia Bielefeld having agreed a three-year contract. The transfer fee paid to Elfsborg was estimated at €400,000.In June 2022, Nilsson agreed to a free transfer to St. Louis City SC. He joined the club in July 2022 and the club itself will begin playing in the MLS in 2023.
CONTENT.Personal life: He is younger brother to the former Sweden national team player Per Nilsson.
CONTENT.External links: Joakim Nilsson at the Swedish Football Association (in Swedish)Joakim Nilsson at SoccerwayJoakim Nilsson at National-Football-Teams.comJoakim Nilsson at Olympics.comJoakim Nilsson at Olympics at Sports-Reference.com (archived)

SUMMARY: Jörgen Joakim Nilsson (born 6 February 1994) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Major League Soccer club St. Louis City SC.
